cash_intro_1: Ndalama zagwiritsidwa ntchito kwa zaka mazana ndipo ndizo ndalama zamaonekedwe zodziwika kwambiri padziko lonse.
cash_intro_2: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zadigitala zomwe zinapangidwa mu 2009 zomwe zimagwira ntchito modziyimira popanda boma kapena olamulira alikulu.
cash_intro_3: Koma kodi ndalama zamaonekedwe zimasiyana bwanji ndi ndalama zadigitala ngati Bitcoin? Tiyeni tione kusiyana kwakukulu pakati pa Bitcoin ndi Ndalama.
point_1_summary_1: Bitcoin imatha kutumizidwa kulikonse padziko lonse pa intaneti, pomwe ndalama zimafuna kukhalapo pamanjanja kapena kukhulupirira anthu apakati.
point_2_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito mofanana padziko lonse - palibe malire mu netiweki ya Bitcoin. Ndalama zimaweruzidwa ndi madera, mitengo yosinthasintha, ndi kulandiridwa kwakomweko.
point_3_summary_1: Maboma amatha kuletsa ndalama usiku umodzi kudzera mwa ndondomeko za demonetization, monga India inachitira mu 2016 pamene analetsa ma noti ena.
point_3_summary_2: Ngakhale osaletsa ma noti ena, maboma amawononga ndalama nthawi zonse kudzera mu kukwera kwa mitengo.
point_3_summary_3: Bitcoin singaletsereke ndi boma kapena olamulira aliyense - imakhala pa netiweki yogawidwa yapadziko lonse yomwe palibe munthu amene amaiyendetsa yekha.
point_4_summary_1: Ndalama zimatha kupangidwa zachinyengo, ndipo nthawi zambiri n'kovuta kuzindikira ma noti achinyengo popanda zipangizo zapadera. Bitcoin imagwiritsa ntchito umboni wa cryptographic womwe umapangitsa kuti kuchinyengo kukhale kosatheka.
point_5_summary_1: Ndalama zimatulutsdwa ndi kulamulira ndi maboma, omwe amatha kusindikiza zambiri, kusintha mapangidwe, kapena kunena kuti ma noti ena alibe ntchito. Bitcoin imagwira ntchito pa netiweki yogawidwa pomwe palibe olamulira mmodzi amene ali ndi ulamuliro.
point_6_summary_1: Ndalama ziyenera kusungidwa pamanjanja, zomwe zimapangitsa kukhala pa chiwopsezo cha kuba, kutayika, moto, kapena kulanda.
point_6_summary_2: Koma Bitcoin imatha kusungidwa motetezeka nokha
point_6_summary_3: pogwiritsa ntchito pulogalamu ya foni kapena chikwama chapadera, zomwe zimakupatsani ulamuliro wathunthu wa ndalama zanu popanda ziwopsezo zosungira pamanjanja.
point_7_summary_1: Ndalama zili ndi malire ang'onoang'ono - simungathe kugawa senti kukhala zigawo zing'onozing'ono. Bitcoin imatha kugawidwa kukhala zigawo 100 miliyoni zomwe zimatchedwa satoshis, zomwe zimalola malipiro ang'onoang'ono ndi machitidwe olondola a ndalama zilizonse.
